title: Dystoria Minimap Icons
description: Special E19 Version for Cobblemon Dystoria
body:
### Edit of E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons for the Cobblemon Server Dystoria

> This Version adds Icons for : 
> - Exlusive Fakemons
> - Dystorian Variants
> - Shinier and Shiniest Pokemons
> - Special Forms

Original E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons : https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons
